EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITinSurface

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control TIN surfaces.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("73B80FBD-FF33-11D1-A549-0000F8774F0F")]
public interface ITinSurface : ISurface, IFunctionalSurface

Properties

CanDoCurvature 

bool CanDoCurvature { get; }

Property Value

bool

Domain 

IPolygon Domain { get; }

Property Value

IPolygon

RasterInterpolationMethod

The elevation interpolation method for rasterization.

esriSurfaceInterpolationType RasterInterpolationMethod { get; set; }

Property Value

esriSurfaceInterpolationType

Sample Snippet

SunPosition

The vector indicating the direction of the light source relative to the scene.

WKSPointZ SunPosition { get; set; }
